recommendations.overview: A court-martialed general rallies together 1200 inmates to rise against the system that put him away.

recommendations.overview: Up-and-coming sports reporter rescues a homeless man ("Champ") only to discover that he is, in fact, a boxing legend believed to have passed away. What begins as an opportunity to resurrect Champ's story and escape the shadow of his father's success

recommendations.title: Fight Club

recommendations.title: A Streetcar Named Desire
recommendations.overview: A disturbed, aging Southern belle moves in with her sister for solace — but being face-to-face with her brutish brother-in-law accelerates her downward spiral.

recommendations.title: Abandoned
recommendations.overview: After a young couple moves into a remote farmhouse with their infant son, the woman's struggles with postpartum psychosis begin to intensify... as the house reveals secrets of its own.

recommendations.overview: A young woman from the Italian countryside experiences the dark side of the business after she moves to Rome to become a star.

recommendations.overview: A former policeman turns full-time robber and goes on a downward spiral of crime in 1970s Rome.
